steps.title: Find the true subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is lost works, which is plural. The phrase about no copy existing is parenthetical and does not change the subject.

steps.title: Match the plural subject
steps.content: Choice B, Choice C, and Choice D are singular verb forms, so they do not agree with the plural subject. A plural present-perfect verb correctly states what has happened to those lost works over time. The answer is A.
